name: Israel
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. **STABLE-BIFURCATED POSTURE: ISRAEL COMFORTABLE WITH US HANDLING IRAN; ISRAEL HANDLES LEBANON.** The May 5 Trump pause of Project Freedom did NOT trigger Israeli editorial framing as betrayal or weakness — Times of Israel and Haaretz led May 5 coverage with LEBANON developments + German FM Baerbock's 'every right' framing on south Lebanon; Iran-direct coverage was secondary and factual. Day 10/14 of Israeli-civilian-casualty trigger window (closes 2026-05-11) — NO Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper. May 5: Hezbollah rocket launches at IDF positions in southern Lebanon (no IDF casualties), drone crashed near Israeli forces (no casualties), IDF intercepted multiple aerial targets following sirens for suspected drone infiltration before crossing into Israeli territory. Asymmetry framework holds: 2,659+ Lebanese killed cumulatively vs ZERO Israeli civilians inside Israel proper. The Trump diplomatic-track activation does NOT constrain Israel's Lebanon operations — operational division of labor confirmed. If trigger window closes May 11 without Israeli civilian casualty, Hezbollah operational degradation framework consolidates as structural intelligence (the Reuters Apr 28 'IRGC seized wartime power' assessment then must reconcile with persistent inability to deliver Israeli civilian casualty inside Israel proper for ~2 weeks).

active_triggers.condition: Iran strikes Dimona nuclear reactor directly
Channel 12/13 or Haaretz publishes IDF imminent-strike preparation on Iran track within 72 hours
